vibe: Futuristic, minimalist, brutalist, high-end tech product. Heavy use of negative space, pure black background, bright accents.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[5rem] font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
scale.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em]

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-24 for sections. Rely on optical alignment.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Brutalist clean feel: rounded-none or rounded-sm max.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento grids with gap-8 or gap-4 for the IDE split panes.

button.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#B900FF] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-none shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(185,0,255,0.5)]
button.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 uppercase text-sm tracking-wider font-mono
button.disabled: opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-500 border border-zinc-700 hover:shadow-none hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-zinc-500

card.default: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-none p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#B900FF] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(185,0,255,0.1)] group

input.default: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-zinc-800 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00E5FF] transition-colors rounded-none px-0 py-4 text-xl md:text-2xl font-light

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-zinc-900. Links: text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors

ide_split_pane.chat_pane: w-1/4 border-r border-zinc-900 bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col
ide_split_pane.code_pane: w-1/4 border-l border-zinc-900 bg-zinc-900 flex flex-col

canvas_nodes.default: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-4 rounded-sm min-w-[200px] absolute shadow-lg

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D network visualization with electric blue and neon violet glowing nodes

Home.instructions: Extremely minimalist hero section. Black background with the generated 3D network visual set to low opacity (bg-black/60 overlay) covering the viewport. Massive headline 'The AI Agent Economy Is Broken. We Are Fixing It.' left-aligned or centered, but brutalist. Simple waitlist input, bottom-border underline style.

Login.instructions: Center screen. Clean card, no rounded corners. Mock auth for 'admin@nova.ai'. Use simple forms.

Academy.instructions: Coming soon page. Massive typography, stark white on black.

Marketplace.instructions: Grid of 3 agent cards. High-end visuals, use the agent card media URLs. Buttons disabled (opacity-50) for Rent/Buy.

Studio.instructions: Admin only split pane IDE. Chat left, canvas middle (dotted bg), code right. Active nodes must glow with electric blue (#00E5FF). Hover states neon violet (#B900FF).

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: Outfit (Heading), IBM Plex Sans (Body), JetBrains Mono (Mono) via index.html or font loaders.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for interface icons.
Ensure the layout strictly uses bg-zinc-950 and bg-zinc-900. No #ffffff backgrounds.
Do NOT use Shadcn's default rounded corners. Override to rounded-none or rounded-sm for brutalist tech vibe.
For the Studio node canvas, mock the interface with absolutely positioned cards. Draw inline SVG lines connecting them. Active paths should be stroke-[#00E5FF].
Footer must be minimal: just '© 2026 Nova AI' and mailto:abbasinidhal@gmail.com on opposite sides. No social icons.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
